review_title: Pretty good at everything so you can launch quickly
description: Overall, Kajabi does just about everything "ok." If your goal is to launch quickly or validate and idea, it's great. If you use more advanced features in email marketing or e-commerce, you may run into some snags.
author: Abbey W.
pros: Kajabi has everything you need to launch an online program quickly. More than once, I've been able to go from idea to launch in just one day. Between the email marketing, carts, and easy to use builder, it's got everything!
cons: While Kajabi does everything, other than the course builder, it doesn't do anything in an excellent way. The email marketing is very basic and the shopping cart doesn't have all the features that I'd like.

review_title: High-end E-learning platform that meets all your needs as an entrepreneur
description: Overall I really like working on Kajabi. You can build a beautiful website and host your courses while connecting easily with your customers. However it is a higher priced software and built more for business owners with tech knowledge who really want to utilize all of it's high-end features
author: Rachel S.
pros: Kajabi is definitely a high-end one stop shop. It allows you to build a beautiful website while also having the functionality of course hosting, email marketing, community management, payment processing, etc.
cons: While Kajabi is a great one-stop-shop platform and very functional and advanced, as a small business, it's hard to justify the high price of the software.

review_title: Powerful All-in-One Platform
description: It’s a reliable platform that makes running an online business much simpler. I didn’t have to deal with multiple tools, which is a big plus. But the cost can be a challenge, especially when you’re just starting out.ome features feel a bit limited unless you’re on higher plans.
author: Ibrahim A.
pros: You can build courses, create landing pages, run email marketing, and manage customers without needing extra tools. It’s clean, easy to use, and saves a lot of time.
cons: The biggest downside is the price it’s quite expensive compared to other platforms especially for beginners.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Kajabi review
description: Had a great overall experience with Kajabi would highly recommend it to friends and my fellow colleagues
author: Alex A.
pros: Had a wonderful experience with Kajabi really liked security customer support marketing and sales email templates and inventory management was super helpful
cons: I had a good experience if I had to pick one certain thing that I wasn’t a big fan of it would probably have to the email management but definitely worth it once you figure it out
author_profession: Peer support specialist, drug and alcohol counselor
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great all-in-one tool for creators
description: Customer service has been excellent. It has been great to create products, services, and set up landing pages and affiliate center. The process has been faster than I thought.
author: Reelika S.
pros: Kajabi is all in one tool for a small business owner and creator, so you don't need to start integrating it with other tools.
cons: There is a technical learning curve to get things up and running.

review_title: Great all-in-one system
author: Renata Z.
pros: Great from the perspective that it's an all-in-one-platform that integrates all the tools to run a successful online business
cons: I felt the cost was so high, there are a lot of features included that I didn't utilize that was factored into the cost of the platform

review_title: Kajabi Is Friendly and Powerful to Use
description: My overall experience with Kajabi is effective.
author: Marika B.
pros: This is an All-in-One Business Platform that suit our business needs. Kajabi has been so consistent and amazing to use.
cons: Kajabi is effective and flawless. It has zero cons.

review_title: Outstanding Overall
description: I am pleased with Kajabi. The staff and customer service team were pretty motivated and helpful. The product is top-notch, aesthetically and functionally and the 30-day trial offer really lets you fully assess the service.
author: Sunny Max R.
pros: Kajabi is robust, and you can tell they've been in the game for a while because there isn't much you can request that they haven't anticipated.
cons: I didn't like having to spend so much time learning where to go for what...I would love to have a single space (a command center) where I could look at the screen, find what I need, and implement my plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Overall thoroughly impressed
description: Really enjoyed it, especially as a first time community manager online. It is user-friendly and satisfying interface.
author: Breanna G.
pros: Kajabi was a great platform to host our online school. I know we got some kind of discount at the beginning for being in when they updated so that was a really nice perk. Customer support was always friendly and helpful. It was great to make a website never had any issues with security. We used it for our marketing and sales funnel and further for generating lead reports. It could send out automated emails and sync well with other apps
cons: Don’t really have anything to complain about. I feel like Kajabi was a high-quality product. And I’m sure it’s getting smoother every day because they updated regularly.

review_title: The best way to monetize my industry knowledge.
description: I joined this to market my training programs on new dispatchers. It puts my products and email list with regard to the website under a single roof. It is strong where the consulting side of my business is concerned but the cost is high where you are not selling digital products on a regular basis.
author: John P.
pros: The email marketing series are extraordinarily simple to establish in order to nurture leads who receive my free transport guides.
cons: Inventory management functions are not available at all that makes it highly challenging to sell physical goods such as branded logbooks. When you have few contacts the pricing structure is extremely aggressive.

review_title: Kajabi has been a win for us
description: So far the experience has been positive. They feel expensive for how we are currently using them, but they offer many capabilities that we haven't even tapped into yet, such as the social media automations, so I'm excited to continue expanding the way we use Kajabi to leverage the possibilities better.
author: Rachel B.
pros: I found it relatively simple to set up and get started with. The support documentation is helpful and thorough. I appreciate the customization options available and the ability to create email campaigns and web pages all in one place.
cons: The location of where you can edit various aspects of your courses/offers is not intuitive. I would appreciate if they added the ability to use videos hosted on YouTube.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Kajabi Does Email Too!
description: Because some clients were using other Kajabi software I decided to give the email a try. Overall for the price, I was satisfied with the platform.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Kajabi worked great for my small email list plus had the segmentation I needed.
cons: I didn't have any problems with Kajabi's email platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Kajabi is the best all in one platform!
description: The customer service is incredible I’ve been able to learn and improve things I was doing by working with chat support they are incredible and the high resolution they use in design work is unmatched
author: Amanda H.
pros: I love the ease of using this, when I first was introduced to Kajabi I had a client using it for their website and they had a designed ghost them and we had a launch for a offer then following week I was able to fully build out a sales funnel from sales page through confirmation emails and tagging. I love the ability to do everything from email marketing, podcast, blogs, courses, offers, accepting payments all in once place.
cons: The cost can be really high for smaller businesses

review_title: Fall in love with Kajabi and all features. Brilliant for e-Learning courses
description: I absolutely love Kajabi! I did a long research before I chose the Kajabi platform. I hate using multiple platforms for Landing Pages, eMail campaigns, eMail automations, CRM, video training platform, membership area, payments, affiliate programs and assessment forms. I wanted all that to be on one place so I dont lose time and money to integrate, I dont deal with too many support teams + I wanted really good support and a company that has a vision for their future and keep working on their platform. After all my researches Kajabi won as it ticked all my boxes :) And their support proved they are really good and fast in answering (asked questions on features)
author: Bilyana G.
pros: It's easy to learn, setup and manage. It has all the features I could think of for my online video training courses and I love the unlimited amount of Landing Pages.
cons: It doesnt have an option currency to be based on the country of payment; it has only PayPal and Stripe but they are changing this at the moment (June 2021) and there are no smart Quiz forms, where the outcome results depends on the answers selected on each question

review_title: The absolute best platform for streamlining your online business
description: Overall it's been amazing. They're constantly making the platform better, they really take user feedback into consideration and even let you try out new features with their "labs" options. They make me feel like they care about me as a user 100x more than any other platform I've ever used.
author: Eliza C.
pros: I love how Kajabi is all-in-one!!! I can run my website, my funnels, my checkout pages, my lead magnets, my membership, my courses, my affiliates, my email marketing, and so much more all from one platform. I no longer have to juggle 12 different platforms and deal with integrations and things breaking like I did before. Even though it's expensive, it's actually saved me money and it's saved me SO MUCH time because of all the headaches I no longer have to deal with.
cons: The affiliate system is clunky and not very user friendly for the admin or the affiliates. Also their customer services has gotten noticeably worse over the last six months. You used to be able to talk to someone extremely knowledgeable on the live chat service and now you talk to people who clearly don't know the platform very well and just send you help articles.

review_title: Better than most, but room for improvement
description: I switched to Kajabi from Teachable. I was very unhappy with Teachable and did not have the time to create content on my own business website. I have created more than 10 separate products with this platform and at times it has a steep learning curve. The UI looks fantastic and very professional. I love how easy it is to add basic content to a product, but wish many of the menus talked to each other much better. The workflow is often very disjointed when creating a new product. I wish they would fix this aspect. If the flow was better and there were more in app capabilities for basic data analysis (e.g., assessment results without needed a separate download), that would be amazing.
author: Maureen B.
pros: I enjoy how easy it is to create, upload and organize content for a given product. I also like the progress monitoring capabilities.
cons: I am incredibly frustrated by the assessment aspect of this platform. It is extremely limited. It is hard to see results from assessments and difficult to set them up. You have to create your assessment before you can add it to a course instead of creating it while you are working on a course. It is a completely different menu. It is also incredibly hard to get assessment results.

review_title: The gold standard of e-learning online business platform
description: I help customers on many online business platforms and they all have quirks but kajabi is really well designed, complete and stable. Its a charm. Very reliable.
author: Daniel D.
pros: Very complete all-in-one online business platform for e-learnig / coaching / paid podcasting / paid newslettersGreat visual builderEase of finding information on customers and their actions
cons: Lacking gamification features. Having this would make it the perfect platform.

review_title: Great option for e-learning and automations
description: I am very pleased with Kajabi. My monthly expenses are 50% of what I was paying having different platforms, and now I know that all my automations run smoothly.
author: Gabriela L.
pros: That I could integrate almost all my business needs under one roof. Before Kajabi I was using other software for performing different tasks in my business. I am not a coder and integrating everything -and making it work!- was kind of a nightmare. Very time consuming. And I use to spend a lot of money. When I found Kajabi it was a life-saver. Email marketing, tagging, email automation, site creation, squeeze pages creation, e-learning platform, forms, surveys, it is an all-in-one solution. It saved me lots of time and money.
cons: Some features need more depth, like metrics. They've done a lot of work regarding this, but there is still room for improvement. Also, they just integrate with Paypal and Stripe for payments. Being based in Latin America, I need also to be able to add the local payment gateway (Mercado Pago). I don't see this happening in the near future from their side, and I am sure that I am losing money because of this.

review_title: Online Course Hub
description: ive used kajabi for different creators courses but what i like best is that all of my courses for diffeerent ceators are in one location so i can easily toggle back and forth depending on what i'm learning
author: latoya B.
pros: how you could set up different courses and classes
cons: the price, it would be a bit expensive for a small business just starting out

review_title: Growing LMS tool for great community management
description: We love Kajabi, it plays an integral part as part of our customer community management. We share training and learning material with our community clients and can track their involvement, report on them etc.
author: Khevana P.
pros: Great tool for content and learning management
cons: Ease of integration with other tools such as CRM

review_title: Multidimensional app
description: I love the multiple functionality Kajabi offers and how it harmonizes the experience into a single app is cool
author: Busola R.
pros: Its is able to create a beautiful community to manage people and relationships. I love that it is able to handle multiple communication. It is also able to handle learnings. I have used Kajabi for my financial modelling training and this has been great. It records your progress however you have done the training, either on your computer or on the app.
cons: I am not sure there is more to request from Kajabi. it can handle both training and communication with other co-users

review_title: Great Platform
author: Brittany E.
pros: This is a very good platform for the coaching industry. Between managing leads, creating emails, creating landing pages, and charging for products, it all works great.
cons: I’m realizing I personally need less and less, so the price point can sometimes be high for me to just utilize a landing page. But that’s really a personal issue.

review_title: Great product
description: My overall expert e has been great. There is a video tutorial for EVERYTHING, so it’s definitely idiots guide material. I do think kajabi should offer 24/7 customer support for every subscription though.
author: Nicola A.
pros: I love that it’s a one stop shop for course creation management as I’m a little lacking in tech confidence and this builds my confidence.
cons: I wish the templates were more adaptable but this is a minor issue. 24/7 for all packages would be the cherry on the cake.

review_title: Makes running an online biz a breeze
description: We're so happy to host our course and membership on Kajabi and will stay with them for years to come. So beautiful and clean looking.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Years ago when we started out, my husband was trying to build our website from scratch using Wordpress plugins. He was pulling all nighters and pulling his hair out...but still was falling behind deadlines and the site looked like crap. Enter stage left, Kajabi, and all our problems were solved. INSTANT profressionalism given to us from their fresh and clean layout and look.
cons: The ONE con I've got is that they don't have any way for the community to really engage inside Kajabi. So our course students and Academy subscription members aren't engaging inside it...and we have to use Facebook instead, which I think we all have a love/hate with these days.

review_title: Kajabi for Coaches
description: My overall experience was great even with all the work I did in the free trial and could not stay. I recommend Kajabi for coaches at a intermediate and advance stage of coaching. But I do recommend kajabi for beginner coaches who I feel can take up their business to afford Kajabi and all of it's amazing features.
author: Stefanie H.
pros: I love everything on Kajabi and what they have for coaches making it am easy all-in-one platform for coaching and courses. As a coach it's the ideal software to keep it all in one software house.
cons: There were still a few limitations that I could do with out and still love Kajabi as a whole. What made decided on a different software was the price. Kajabi is not for beginners coaches. I feel Kajabi is better suited for coaches and course creators with residual income even with the most basic plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
